Fields.Name: AtkParam ID
Fields.Description: Attack parameters for bullet impact.

Fields.Name: Projectile FX ID
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID for bullet projectile.

Fields.Name: Impact FX ID
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID for bullet impact.

Fields.Name: Flick FX ID
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID for bullet flick. Normally triggered by guarding.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Maximum time before bullet will disappear on its own. -1 means it will last indefinitely.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Range
Fields.Description: Distance at which attenuation of the projectile begins.

Fields.Name: Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: Time between emitted bullets. Does nothing for bullets that only shoot once.

Fields.Name: Gravity: In Range
Fields.Description: Downward acceleration of bullet.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Downward acceleration of bullet after it passes the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Range
Fields.Description: Bullet will stop homing if it is within this distance of its homing target.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: Initial speed of bullet.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: In Range
Fields.Description: Forward acceleration acting on bullet before it reaches the attenuation distance. Negative values will slow the bullet down.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Forward acceleration acting on bullet after it passes the attenuation distance. Negative values will slow the bullet down.

Fields.Name: Max Velocity
Fields.Description: Maximum speed of bullet, regardless of acceleration.

Fields.Name: Min Velocity
Fields.Description: Minimum speed of bullet, regardless of acceleration.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Time that acceleration is active after bullet creation.

Fields.Name: Homing Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance from owner at which the bullet starts homing in on targets.

Fields.Name: Initial Hit Radius
Fields.Description: Initial hit radius of bullet projectile.

Fields.Name: Final Hit Radius
Fields.Description: Final hit radius of bullet projectile. Set to -1 if radius does not change, which is always coupled with a value of 0 for RadiusIncreaseDuration.

Fields.Name: Radius Spread Time
Fields.Description: Time taken by bullet to transition from initial to final hit radius. Value of 0 are always coupled with values of -1 for RadiusIncreaseDuration.

Fields.Name: Explosion Delay
Fields.Description: Delay between impact and 'explosion'.

Fields.Name: Hitbox Duration
Fields.Description: Duration of bullet impact hitbox. A value of zero means it is disabled immediately after first impact.

Fields.Name: External Force in Bullet Direction
Fields.Description: External force applied in the direction of shooting. (Y-axis is removed)

Fields.Name: Shooter Effect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to owner when bullet is created.

Fields.Name: Bullet AI
Fields.Description: AI parameter ID for triggered floating bullets.

Fields.Name: Hit Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Bullet emitted on impact of this bullet.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [0]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target hit by bullet.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [1]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target hit by bullet.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [2]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target hit by bullet.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [3]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target hit by bullet.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [4]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target hit by bullet.

Fields.Name: Bullet Count
Fields.Description: Number of bullets emitted at once.

Fields.Name: Homing Angle
Fields.Description: Turning angle of homing bullet per second.

Fields.Name: Launch Angle
Fields.Description: Specify how many times the missile is fired forward.

Fields.Name: Launch Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple missiles, specify how often to fire them. (Y-axis)

Fields.Name: Launch Elevation Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple missiles, specify how often to fire them. (X-axis)

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Physical
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in physical damage per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Magic
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in magic damage per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Fire
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in fire damage per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Lightning
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in lightning damage per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Stamina
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in stamina damage per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Knockback
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction in knockback power per second.

Fields.Name: Launch Elevation Angle
Fields.Description: Additional elevation angle from the horizontal.

Fields.Name: Lock Direction Limit Angle
Fields.Description: Limit angle when facing the lock direction

Fields.Name: Can Penetrate
Fields.Description: Bullet will go through objects, players, and NPCs.

Fields.Name: Previous Velocity Direction Rate
Fields.Description: Ratio of adding the previous moving direction to the current direction when a sliding bullet hits the wall.

Fields.Name: Material Attack Type
Fields.Description: Determines visual effects of bullet hit.

Fields.Name: Material Attack Material
Fields.Description: Sound and visual effects on hit.

Fields.Name: Material Size
Fields.Description: 'Size' of attack.

Fields.Name: Launch Condition Type
Fields.Description: Condition for determining if a new bullet will be generated when this bullet lands or expires.

Fields.Name: Follow Type
Fields.Description: Follow-up type. Do not follow is the default.

Fields.Name: Emitter Source Type
Fields.Description: Source type. Usually from Damipoli. (Introduced to judge meteo)

Fields.Name: Is Persistent Attack SFX
Fields.Description: Set whether bullets such as arrows will remain stuck in the character

Fields.Name: Is Continuous Hit
Fields.Description: Do you keep hitting?

Fields.Name: Is Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: If it is ON, it will penetrate without landing when hitting a hit / static asset.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Both Teams
Fields.Description: Are you an enemy or an ally? (Not a wandering ghost)

Fields.Name: Is Use Shared Hit List
Fields.Description: Specify whether to share the hit list

Fields.Name: Use Multiple Dummy Polys for Placement
Fields.Description: Do you use the same Damipoly ID more than once when placing bullets?

Fields.Name: Force Erase Bullet if Hit by Other Bullet
Fields.Description: Does it hit other bullets forced erasure?

Fields.Name: Is Deflected by Magic
Fields.Description: If true, this bullet will be deflected by bullets like Force.

Fields.Name: Is SFX Ignored On Water Hit
Fields.Description: If true, hit FX are not produced if the bullet impacts water.

Fields.Name: Is Move State Ignored On Water Hit
Fields.Description: Should I ignore the effect if it hits the surface of the water?

Fields.Name: Can be Deflected by Bullet Deflection
Fields.Description: If true, this bullet will be deflected by bullets like Spell Parry.

Fields.Name: Is Effect Inherited by Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Take over the effect to replace the submunition. Ignore the speed set for the submunition

Fields.Name: Is Speed Inherited by Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Take over the speed of the timing to replace the submunition. Ignore the speed set for the submunition
